messages.text: A healing totem's steady pulse washes over you, guarding and mending you as you fight.
A healing totem's steady pulse washes over {name}.
The healing totem pulses, soothing a little more of your hurt.
The healing totem falls quiet and its soothing pulse fades from you.
The healing totem's pulse fades from {name}.
{name} is bathed in the steady, mending pulse of a healing totem.
